title: [ImportVerilog] add handle comparison ops and lower ==/!=/===/!==
body:
Introduce handle comparison operations in the Moore dialect:
- moore.handle_eq / moore.handle_ne
- moore.handle_case_eq / moore.handle_case_ne

Add a NullableType constraint to support comparisons against null.

Update ImportVerilog lowering to route chandle/class handle equality and case-equality operators through the new ops, and add FileCheck coverage for handle-vs-null comparisons.
